concept.title: AI Assistant and Integrations
concept.shortdesc: This section answers questions about the metR's AI assistant and integrations.

othermeta.name: shortdesc
othermeta.content: Answers questions about the metR AI assistant and how it integrates with external systems and workflows.

section.title: What is metR AI Assistant?

p.b: The metR AI Assistant helps you quickly find and understand information across your content.

section.p: Instead of showing long documents or search results, it provides clear answers generated directly from published structured content available in metR. Because responses are generated from structured, governed content and retrieved using semantic relationships, the AI Assistant provides more precise and relevant answers, reducing the need for manual searching.

section.title: How does metR support AI initiatives?

p.b: metR prepares your content so AI can use it accurately, safely, and explainably.

section.p: By converting documents into structured topics with rich metadata and semantic relationships, metR creates a foundation that AI systems can reliably retrieve from.
This enables high-quality search, RAG pipelines, and knowledge graphs without costly rework or post-processing.

section.title: Why does “structured content” matter for AI?

p.b: AI performs best when information is explicit, connected, and governed.

section.p: Unstructured documents force AI to guess; structured content gives it context, boundaries, and meaning.
metR ensures your content is machine-understandable while remaining human-readable—reducing hallucinations and increasing trust in AI-generated answers.

section.title: What integrates metR AI Assistant with our CMS?

p.b: The integration between the metR AI Assistant and your CMS is enabled through published structured content from your existing CMS or delivery systems such as Strapi.

section.p: metR AI Assistant connects to this published content without requiring changes to how content is authored or managed.

section.title: Does metR integrate with other content management systems or tools?

p.b: Yes. metR integrates with GitHub for version control, Strapi and Docusaurus for publishing, and CI/CD systems via webhooks.

section.p: Existing XML editors and pipelines can continue to be used.
